hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∀ ⦃I B : Set α⦄,
    (∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) →
      ¬Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I →

          ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)

intro I J hI hJ hIJ

    obtain ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJsub⟩ := hJ

    -- Let G' be the graph with edges M_I ∆ M_J.
    let G' := hMI.restrict₂ hMJ
    -- The max degree of G' is at most 2.
    have hdeg : G'.MaxDegreeLE 2 := hMI.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hMJ
